nasb.text: So the service was prepared, and the priests stood at their stations and the Levites by their divisions according to the king’s command.

esv.text: When the service had been prepared for, the priests stood in their place, and the Levites in their divisions according to the king’s command.

cnv.text: 這樣，事奉的職務安排好了以後，他們照著王的吩咐，祭司站在自己的崗位，利未人也按著自己的班次侍立。

ccb.text: 一切都准备好后，依照王的吩咐，祭司站在自己的地方，利未人按照班次侍立。
